MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS WESTERN INSTITUTE OF SCIENCE & HEALTH, EDUPRISE, LLC AND PAUL DUNN MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING ACTION:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE DENIED. ALLEGATIONS OF WRONGFUL CONDUCT IN SAN FRANCISCO SUFFICIENT TO DEFEAT MOTION FOR TRANSFER UNDER VENUE RULES FOR FEHA. ALL CAUSES OF ACTION ARISE FROM SAME UNDERLYING FACTS).
